name: Edge Case — Unicode and Special Characters in Labels
input: Create a comparison of research approaches across regions: North America (α=0.05, p<0.001), Europe (β-coefficient, CI 95%), Asia-Pacific (χ² test, OR>2.5).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Comparison handling special characters, Greek letters, and math symbols gracefully.

data.title: Regional Research Statistical Approaches

items.label: North America
items.description: Significance threshold α=0.05, commonly reports p<0.001

items.label: Europe
items.description: Emphasis on β-coefficient and 95% confidence intervals

items.label: Asia-Pacific
items.description: Frequent use of χ² test, odds ratio OR>2.5 thresholds

data.caption: Regional differences in statistical reporting conventions
